description: Invite members, change roles, revoke access, and audit membership changes

userStories.title: Invite member by email
userStories.description: As an admin, I can invite a member by email so they receive an invite link and join the workspace.
acceptanceCriteria: Invite endpoint sends email with invite link

userStories.title: Change member role
userStories.description: As an admin, I can change a member's role between viewer, editor, admin so permissions update.
acceptanceCriteria: UI and API to change role

userStories.title: Revoke workspace access
userStories.description: As an admin, I can revoke a member's access so former members cannot sign in.

userStories.title: Audit log and recent membership view
userStories.description: As an admin, I can review recent membership changes and audit details in workspace settings.
acceptanceCriteria: Audit entries recorded for invites, role changes, revokes
Settings page shows recent membership changes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
